clues.clue_text: No heat, yet it makes things beat; No leg yet it makes flow meet….\n Through iron veins the river run, pushed by gaints you never see run!!
No book I read, no word I write; Yet convey message day and night…..\n No leaves no bird upon my crown, yet I send voices all around!!
Not an earthquake, yet things move; where the structure learn its hidden grove….\n doors may open, nothing loud; yet forces gather like a crowd!!
I don’t speak, yet I revel the hidden dust you cannot see….\n not a human still I care; I quietly college air!!!
Not front where people meet, but where dust and silence greet; \n broken stones beneath your files rest in stacks discreet.
Hari ghas ne mujhe ghera, Bijali se hai mera nata gehara….\n swad ke baaye dundho baitha hu kaha, Khazana milega yaha!!!
Books whisper behind, yet I stand ahead where every journey begins instead ….\n To her left I hide, engines rest I store the blues what quenches the quest..
Not a garden , not a wild; Not a place where footsteps piled \n Behind the thinkers of gears and chains, I am visible to those who work Iin plains.
A line of sentinels; Blue and snow, I hold some greens and help them grow….\n A place to pause to breath, to stay where minds resets before their way
Where books stand tall in silent rows, A moving room beside it goes but I guard the steps that hide from sight half sleep in metal light
Rukte hai log, khatam hoti chinta har ek sawal ka jawab yehi pe hai milta ….\n bhid Aksar nahi hoti yaha, Apki agli paheli bethi hai vaha!!
No river here, yet water runs; No boat here, yet journey’s done….\n Where flow is studied fast or slow, A silent place where water go!!
Jaha khamoshi khabar ban jati hai, aur pal tasveron mai bas jati hai....\n No eyes I have yet all I see, find me I’m hiding quietly.
Silent giants lie with hollow hearts, Strength is judged before it starts….\n I do not breath, Yet I endure under pressure, I stay pure!!
Behind silent books where knowledge sleeps, beside wheels that whisper secret girls keep….\n Where duty pauses in hidden nest, find me where the unseen take their rest.
Not a classroom, yet lessons bloom; In whispers gossips and spicy fumes….\n Chairs remember stories untold, where breaks feel warmer than gold
I grow in clusters, tall yet thin; A forest whisper tucked within….\n No chairs I hold, no bed I lay, yet many pause with me each day
Engines sleep where future builders roam, besides a wall that stands silent like a dome….\n Beyond its back crowd may scream, As ball hits the sky in a grassy dream!!
I hold years you left behind, In files where memories confined;\n No sunlight writes, No echoes stay ; Yet I remember every day!!!
Three silent mouths in a tiled embross where iron minds and builders trace from building dreams to machines that rare source of life presents in chore
A yellow whisper points the way where engineer minds are shaped each day; \n  Four wheels rest where scholars roam, Bet from beasts and walls of stone.
No lungs no life, yet air I press: A silent force in loud distress….\n I trap the air and make it tight; Bend breeze with forceful might
No crowds I keep, yet all must pass through narrow veins of stone ahead….\n Before decisions inked in rooms ahead, My quit floor feel what’s unsaid.
Faces pass but truth I see, A card decides your destiny….\n Step ahead if you belong; else my pause will prove you wrong !!
Na mein manzil, Na koi rasta hu; Jo mujh se guzre uske liye safalta ki dastan hu….\n Sapne sabke alag, Par mai sabhko jodhta hu; Sabh ke liye kismat ke darwaje kholta hu!!

Aawaji ka ghar hu, Par mera koi swar nahi.... \n Bheed samete baitha hu, Par mera koi dar nahi….\n Kabhi    taali, Kabhi khamoshi mujhme gunjti rahe, Jaha chehare bohot hai magar ek sa koi nahi bataon me kon !!
One ends journey with a stare, one begins them everywhere….\n Books, tools and hunger’s call, choose your turn or lose it all.

clues.location_description: Power House Main Generator Near main gate

clues.clue_text: I don’t sell food, but I feed your soul; With games and muscle as my goal…. \n Feast on left, Study on right; I bring you strength day and light.
Two twins I wear, yet none may pass; I guard the hum of iron and grass….\n Forever closed through paths seam near, where silent work breathes out of ear.
Where silence clicks and cursor blink; where more is stored than eyes can think….\n A red witness sleeps on side; Waiting for the heat the day decide.
Concrete watches, Glass repeats dust below forgets the rain it meets….\n In the barren court where life seems
clues.location_description: Civil Building side of seminar hall glass

clues.clue_text: No clock yet I curve like time , No fortess yet walk align….\n Rectangles store but never see, Guarding codes and circulatory
A mouth that opens once a day to the left stones speak to the right gears stay focused its getting really hot

clues.location_description: Front of main gate selfie mirror

clues.clue_text: Look carefully! Where the captain keeps his beverages...
Follow the sea breeze! To the place where the crew gathers...
X marks the spot! Where the ship's logs are safely stored...
Beware the sirens! Seek the shiny reflection that looks back at you.
Almost there! To the crow's nest, where you can see the whole deck.
The final treasure awaits! Where the captain rests his head...

Before mind ignite and circuits a wake; There lies a pause no motion can take.... 
Feathers descends where no fire ignites; To sip from a mirror that forgets its fight.

I speak in three tongues; Yet i have no mouth...
One tells you how to behave,
One reminds you who you are, 
One remembers those who ruled before.
One serves the soil without demand; One shapes the world with coded hand.... /n Under one roof they wait unseen; Duty and data where both convene.
clues.location_description: NSS AND COMP SOCIETY OF INDIA

clues.clue_text: Mein behta nahi fir bhi badal jata hu; dabav padhte hi sambhal jata hu…. /n Imarat ki Kismat mujhse hai judi; batao mein hu konsi kadi?
Through narrow panes; the light bends thin…. /n Secrets brew in racks within; measured drops decide the fate stability is periodically a debate.
Na kitab puri, na kahani saaf; boj, dabaav or bhar ki hoti hai baat…./n Jo jhuke nahi, Soch ka kamal, Konse darwaje ke piche chupa ye sawal?

Jaha shor mai swaad apni duniya basate hai; Vahi sanaato mein koi jeevan sajata hai …. 
Safed dewaron ke piche hariyali ki chav, Ek Neela sa raja rakhe jeevan ka gaao.

Across the void they sync they flow; Guess the place where networks grow….
A puzzle of pieces dar and wide; Each unaware of other’s side.

Close to fall that never descends; Near Something that’s viscous but never bends….
What you except will not be true; The answer hides where green meets view.

Not a road yet journey begins; Not a Mountain yet heights are won….
Steel whispers beside me softly to shed remember every thread
No forests here, yet nests are made; In cores where the light fade, /nAbove lawn’s unending green; Towards right of techs where future is seen!!

It doesn’t speak, yet plays it part Where two ‘H’s and a ‘O’ gets pure and out….
Close to where brief joys appear, and calm surrounds it year to year.

No window, wide No open sky, yet energy is passing by….
Not just beams and columns here another system works sincere.

On cool tiled thrones we laughed and stay, while time between the bells slips away…. 
Aawaz Kho jaye  Jis Dehliz par, wahi Milte Hain Hazaro Safar.

Bethane ko lage jaha pr dar, Safed rang de ye apka saar....
Kunki upper hai uske kabutaron ka vishram ghar.

I do not write; yet I create….
Your words reborn at rapid rate, 
Near Green Whisper and shaded ground; Endless duplicates here are Found….

Where names meet fate before the door; Silent lifts whisper “there is more” ….
Circuit guards what lies inside; While future waits just outside.
